venue_booked.headline: You booked your venue.
venue_booked.body: That's the hardest one. Seriously — finding the right venue, locking a date, signing a contract, and making it real takes more than most people expect. Everything else builds on this. Take a breath.

photographer_booked.headline: Your photographer is booked.
photographer_booked.body: Your day is going to be beautiful, and you'll have it forever. You chose well.

save_dates_sent.headline: It's official.
save_dates_sent.body: People are clearing their calendars for you right now. That's a real thing that's happening.

stage_1_complete.headline: Foundation: complete.
stage_1_complete.body: You know what you want, you've agreed on your vision, and your guest count is set. That's the real work. Everything from here is building on a solid foundation.

stage_2_complete.headline: You have a date. You have a venue.
stage_2_complete.body: Two of the most important pieces are locked. The rest of the planning has somewhere to live now.

stage_3_complete.headline: Your core team is in place.
stage_3_complete.body: Photographer, caterer, music, officiant — the people who will make your day happen are confirmed. That's no small thing.

stage_4_complete.headline: Your people know about your wedding.
stage_4_complete.body: Invites sent. Website up. Guests can start planning their travel. It's real to the people you love now.

stage_5_complete.headline: The details are in place.
stage_5_complete.body: Florals, invitations, attire, rehearsal dinner — the pieces that make a wedding feel like yours are set. You're close.

stage_6_complete.headline: You're ready.
stage_6_complete.body: Headcount in, vendors confirmed, timeline built, rehearsal done. You've done everything you can do. Now you just get to enjoy it.

stage_7_complete.headline: You did it.
stage_7_complete.body: The wedding happened, the thank-yous are sent, the photos are backed up. It's done — and it was yours. Congratulations.

task_batch_3.message: 3 things done. You're building real momentum.
